name: FlexGuard Life

data_sources.note: Prudential RILA product page. FlexGuard Life is the life-insurance-rider variant of the FlexGuard suite (not a separate RILA in LIMRA reporting). Note: FlexGuard Life is more accurately classified as an indexed variable universal life product; retained in RILA catalog for completeness but flagged.
Pruco Life Insurance Company AM Best FSR A+ (Superior). Synthetic anchor confirmed.

verification_notes: AM Best verified; product classification flagged — FlexGuard Life is closer to an indexed variable universal life product than a pure RILA, but retained in catalog with synthetic_v0 since the underlying index-linked accumulation mechanics share the same model. Removed from market-coverage % denominator in coverage analysis. Cap rate and surrender schedule not verified from prospectus.
